title: Treseder Lab Pyrosequencing Protocol
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"8o4fr","text":" DNA Extraction","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cafo2","text":"Extract DNA from sample using the phenol/chloroform procedure or your kit of choice. We typically use the Mo Bio Power Soil DNA extraction kit for extracting DNA from soil and plant litter samples.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ainav","text":"Use the Nanodrop in the Martiny lab to estimate the concentration and purity of your DNA extraction.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"37lg4","text":"Dilute DNA to 10 ng/ul prior to PCR.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"22tm","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9k93k","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7crtp","text":" PCR Amplification","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dkbf4","text":"Pre-amplification checklist:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7ftao","text":"All pipetting should be done with aerosol barrier, PCR certified pipet tips in a PCR work station","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1espj","text":"On ice thaw primers, DNA and PCR master mix","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2s33a","text":"Decontaminate pipettors and interior surfaces of a PCR workstation with DNA/RNA Away or 10% bleach solution.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fpcba","text":"UV irradiate PCR work station interior, pipettors and consumables for minimum 15 min","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3683e","text":"All samples should be amplified in triplicate.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2n36o","text":"Include negative (no template) and positive (DNA isolated from mushroom) controls.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1e2l8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9k45m","text":"Primer information:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f56fb","text":"Forward primer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dot7m","text":"454 primer B + 'AG' linker + SSU817f","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"djqve","text":"GCCTTGCCAGCCCGCTCAGAGTTAGCATGGAATAATRRAATAGGA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fm99n","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c52jq","text":"Reverse Primer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dt1sp","text":"454 primer A + 12-base bar code + 'AC' linker + ssu1196r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4rnvs","text":"GCCTCCCTCGCGCCATCAG-12 base bar code-ACTCTGGACCTGGTGAGTTTCC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"34su9","text":"Example barcode: ACACACTATGGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f67bj","text":"Example primer sequence: GCCTCCCTCGCGCCATCAGACACACTATGGCACTCTGGACCTGGTGAGTTTCC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9edao","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"54ak4","text":"PCR Cocktail:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d9quv","text":"22.5 ul PCR master mix (we use the Invitrogen Platinum PCR SuperMix)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ojbt","text":"1 ul BSA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ec2tq","text":"0.75 ul 10 uM forward primer (all samples get the same forward primer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9rqpm","text":"0.75 ul 10 uM reverse primer (all samples get a unique barcoded reverse primer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1hpng","text":"1 ul template DNA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"90g56","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"28ptn","text":"PCR cycle:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"34me3","text":"Samples are initially denatured at 94°C for 10 min, then amplified using 30 cycles of 94°C for 45 sec, 52°C for 30 sec, and 72°C for 90 sec. A final extension of 10 min at 72°C is added at the end of the program to ensure complete amplification of the target region.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"64e4g","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"101qv","text":" Check for PCR product on a gel","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":31}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"s24s","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ut6m","text":" Amplicon Cleaning","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8mtob","text":"Combine the triplicate PCR reactions into a single volume","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"74qdo","text":"Clean PCR reactions with a PCR clean up kit. The MoBio UltraClean PCR clean up kit and the Invitrogen Purelink PCR purification kit have both worked well.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4erc5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4q4ek","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fie0","text":" Amplicon Quantification","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"euk79","text":"Use the qubit system for quantifying DNA, with a few modifications.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5jaaq","text":"Instead of using the qubit assay tubes, prepare the samples in black microplates.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a7tgm","text":"Perform assay with 1 ul of PCR product","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ngap","text":"Read the plates on the microplate reader in the Allison lab set at 485ex /530em. Estimate amplicon concentration using the standard curve.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1o8dc","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fhekd","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"82nps","text":" Amplicon Pooling","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b9ku9","text":"Combine equal amounts of DNA per sample into single vessel (usually a 15 mL tube).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"36sg7","text":"Concentrate pooled amplicons using the Invitorgen Purelink PCR purification kit","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9j4ml","text":"Run a gel to visualize pooled samples","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6rhp8","text":"Depending on how your pooled amplicons look on the gel, you may need to gel purify the pooled amplicons. Pyrosequencing is biased towards shorter reads. If you have a messy band on your gel, it is important to purify your samples to improve the quality of the DNA you will receive.  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aq3p7","text":"We used the Qiagen QIAquick Gel Extraction Kit. We ran samples out on a 1.4 % gel.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d7ns3","text":"
 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4i2uk","text":"The main drawback to performing a gel extraction is that you will almost certainly lose some of your sample. You may need to pool additional PCR product and perform a second gel extraction to obtain enough sample for sequencing.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1967n","text":"
 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2dm9l","text":"Remove contaminants from gel purified samples using an Invitrogen Purelink PCR purification kit.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6idfn","text":"
  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eg8r1","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bj4q2","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"393v","text":" Estimate final sample concentration and purity","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e3c0i","text":"Use the qubit system for estimating sample concentration. The sequencing facility requires 2-3 ug of DNA for sequencing.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1l55m","text":"Use the Nanodrop in the Martiny lab for estimating sample purity. Samples with an A260/A280 ratio of ~1.8 typically provide optimal sequencing results.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bqpec","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d4an8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2aobq","text":" Send sample for sequencing","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7g7j2","text":"Send samples to the Engencore sequencing facility at the University of South Carolina. Check their website for more specific details about what else to include in the shipment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3catd","text":"Send samples overnight on dry ice","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
